name: skyway-claude
description: Wires the skyway workflow-orchestration MCP into Claude Code: one HTTP MCP server exposing run/step inspection, job control, workflow lint + source, cost estimation, and approval/waiter tools for authoring and operating .sky workflows. Bundles a daemon watchdog monitor (alerts when the :3090 daemon goes down), a /skyway-status command, and an operate skill. Additive — complements native Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Bash tools, does not replace them.
